auth.emailRequiredForPasskey: Enter your email to sign in with a passkey

register.title: Add a passkey
register.description: Use your device's biometric sensor or PIN to authenticate quickly and securely.

errors.registerFailed: Passkey registration failed. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Set up your account
onboarding.subtitle: Complete these steps to get started

email.title: Verify your email
email.description: Check your email for a verification link or code.
email.label: Verification code

phone.title: Verify your phone
phone.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your registered phone number.
phone.label: Verification code

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.description: Upload a clear photo of your national ID or passport.
kyc.label: Document

pending.title: Under review
pending.description: Your identity documents have been submitted. We'll verify them within 24 hours.
pending.approvedDescription: Your identity has been verified. You're ready to go.
pending.rejectedDescription: We couldn't verify your identity. Please try again with a clearer photo.

errors.verifyEmailFailed: Email verification failed. Please check your code.
errors.verifyPhoneFailed: Phone verification failed. Please check your code.
errors.kycUploadFailed: Document upload failed. Please try again.
errors.completeFailed: Setup completion failed. Please try again.
